channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 10 Patshull Road, 10th June
item.description:
Drain in road is blocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Patshull Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woodland Grove sign needed at beginning of road, 10th June
item.description:
There is no sign at the beginning of Woodland Grove showing the road’s name. There is only one sign at the end of the street about 200m away, not visible at the beginning of the street. Because of this delivery drivers keep getting lost, and we also get deliveries from other addresses. Also note that Woodland Grove is a one way street so it’s very important to have a sign where the road begins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti vandalism, 10th June
item.description:
Graffiti painting on black box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Peckham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London

item.title: Abandoned white Nissan Juke on corner of Limes Road, 10th June
item.description:
An apparently abandoned white Nissan Juke, registration LV67 CVH, has been parked on the corner of Limes Road near Limes Court flats since early in 2026 and has not moved as of 10 June.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limes Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop in need to repair. Also graffiti., 10th June
item.description:
Two months bus stop has needed repair for the past two months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Burton Road, Queen's Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering in front garden, 10th June
item.description:
People keep throwing their rubbish in our garden. It is usually small food wrappers, bottles and cans for products purchase in the nearby shop. There is a little public garden area and a large sidewalk very close that don’t have bins. Can you please add a bin there so people don’t have to litter our garden?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tumble dryer, 10th June
item.description:
Just dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the top of Saint Julian’s Road., 10th June
item.description:
An electric heater has been abandoned. Please collect.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: A Bexley Council blue-lid bin abandoned, 10th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Longmeadow Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: At the top of Saint Julian’s Road,, 10th June
item.description:
There is an old telephone exchange box here that is clearly out of use and needs permanent removal. Can this be organised?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
